name: Goodie Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate with butter in a microwave.
2. Beat in the dry milk powder, peanut butter, and vanilla until fairly smooth.
3. Stir in the raisins and peanuts.
4. Spread the mixture into a buttered 13-inch X 9-inch X 2-inch pan.
5. Chill until firm.
6. Cut into bars.
